Compliance.description: No SA regulatory issues found; ISO 27001, GDPR; HR software not heavily regulated but POPIA-relevant security in place; clean track record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: 4.2/5 avg from 187+ Capterra/GetApp/SoftwareAdvice reviews; positives outweigh minor cons; no HelloPeter complaints found.

Product Value.description: Free core option excellent value; modular paid adds flexibility but can increase costs; strong features for price.

Innovation.description: Modular HRMS with mobile app, ATS, AI interview assistant, performance 360, roster drag-drop, integrations; active 2025 updates.

Customer Support.description: Responsive, helpful per reviews (3.8-4.0/5); white glove implementation praised.

Accessibility & Security.description: ISO 27001, GDPR compliant with MFA, role-based access, audit trails, backups; no explicit POPIA mention but general data security strong for HR data.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free Starter; Advanced custom quote (no public 2025/2026 ZAR pricing found)

socialSentiment.summary: Positive reviews on Capterra/GetApp; no HelloPeter/Google SA-specific complaints; high app praise on Android.
